scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix backend run typecheck && npm --prefix frontend run build
scripts.smoke:seed: DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./data/smoke-health.sqlite} ./scripts/run-bun.sh --cwd backend src/migrate.ts --fresh && DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./data/smoke-health.sqlite} ./scripts/run-bun.sh --cwd backend src/user-cli.ts create --email=smoke@example.com --password=Password123 --name=Smoke || true
scripts.smoke:serve: npm run build && HOST=127.0.0.1 PORT=${PORT:-5555} DB_PATH=${DB_PATH:-./data/smoke-health.sqlite} REDIS_URL=${REDIS_URL:-redis://127.0.0.1:6379} ./scripts/run-bun.sh --cwd backend src/server.ts
